identity.name: nx-session-query
identity.description: Ask one safe local question over one JSON or JSONL session artifact

flags.name: --input
flags.description: Path to one JSON or JSONL session artifact

flags.name: --question
flags.description: Safe ask-only question over the artifact

flags.name: --harness-provider
flags.description: Optional harness provider alias such as codex or gemini

flags.name: --max-evidence-items
flags.description: How many evidence excerpts to keep, 1-5

flags.name: --pretty
flags.description: Render a compact terminal view instead of JSON

flags.name: --output
flags.description: Output path for JSON or pretty text

exit_codes.2: Invalid arguments or missing input file
